items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the event-to-delivery lineage for auditability, but the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for event-to-delivery lineage, yet there are no concrete examples or data points that demonstrate its implementation or verification. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary evidence is lacking.
